formulas.mean: (inputs.dataPoint1 + inputs.dataPoint2 + inputs.dataPoint3 + inputs.dataPoint4 + inputs.dataPoint5 + inputs.dataPoint6 + inputs.dataPoint7 + inputs.dataPoint8) / 8
formulas.ss: Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint1 - mean, 2) + Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint2 - mean, 2) + Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint3 - mean, 2) + Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint4 - mean, 2) + Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint5 - mean, 2) + Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint6 - mean, 2) + Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint7 - mean, 2) + Math.pow(inputs.dataPoint8 - mean, 2)
formulas.sumCubedDev: Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint1 - mean) / stdDev, 3) + Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint2 - mean) / stdDev, 3) + Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint3 - mean) / stdDev, 3) + Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint4 - mean) / stdDev, 3) + Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint5 - mean) / stdDev, 3) + Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint6 - mean) / stdDev, 3) + Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint7 - mean) / stdDev, 3) + Math.pow((inputs.dataPoint8 - mean) / stdDev, 3)
